text:
Recycle (, rom. Risaikuru) is a spell card found in the Greed Island game. It allows the caster to turn an item back into a card, provided that the card is below C-Rank.
__NOTOC__

!Card Effect:
| colspan="3" align="center" |Allows an item converted from a card to be changed into card form once more. (Limited to cards of rank below C. If the applicable card limit is already at MAX, “Recycle” disappears without converting the target item.)
|
|-
!How to Obtain:
| colspan="3" align="center" |Purchasable at the Spell Card Shop in Masadora.
|
|}

Summary

This spell allows the caster to reconvert an item that was previously a card back into a card, provided the target card is below C-Rank. If the target card's conversion limit has already been reached, "Recycle" will fail.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.1037 :: 
カード化を解除されたアイテムを、もう１度カード化することができる。（ランクＣ以下のアイテムに限る。対象アイテムのカード化限度枚数がＭＡＸだった場合、再カード化は出来ず、「再生」は破壊される。）
|-
![Eng]
|No.1037 :: Recycle 
A card that has released into an item, you are able to change it to a card 1 more time. (Restricted to Rank C and below items. In the case where the target item card's transformation limit is MAX, 're-card' is not possible, "recycle" is destroyed.)
|}

Trivia

In Chapter 150, Killua had Gon convert his "Paladin's Necklace" into an item since they could cast "Recycle" on it once they had the means to copy the card.
